scripts.build:bridge: mkdir -p resources && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o resources/input-bridge.exe ./input-bridge
scripts.package: npm run build:native && npm run build:bridge && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis
scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js
